state_manifold.state_type: CENTER ALGEBRA of PSL2(Z/72Z) (internal CRT route)
state_manifold.embedding_function: Build SL2(Z/8Z) and SL2(Z/9Z) conjugacy classes + class-sum structure constants, then form PSL2(Z/72Z) conjugacy classes as sign-orbits of product classes under (i8,i9) ~ (neg(i8),neg(i9)), with exact orbit-basis multiplication via lift/multiply/project
constraints: All arithmetic is exact (int, Fraction); no floats.
Factor caches are for SL2(Z/8Z) and SL2(Z/9Z) with deterministic class ordering by minimal element.
Orbit cache defines PSL2(Z/72Z) conjugacy classes as size-2 sign-orbits of product conjugacy classes (no fixed orbits for N=72).
Orbit-basis multiplication is defined by lifting to product class-sum tensor basis with K̄_orbit := (1/2)(K_pair + K_negpair), multiplying using factor structure constants, then projecting back.

invariants.name: provenance_lock
invariants.definition: Engine source hash and cache file hashes match the certificate.

invariants.name: factor_correctness
invariants.definition: Factor group sizes, conjugacy class partitions, identity/-identity classes, inversion/negation class maps, and class-sum structure constants are correct for SL2(Z/8Z) and SL2(Z/9Z).

invariants.name: orbit_correctness
invariants.definition: Orbit cache covers all product class pairs exactly once, has exactly 375 orbits, no fixed sign-orbits, correct orbit sizes, and deterministic representatives in PSL2(Z/72Z).

invariants.name: quotient_center_algebra
invariants.definition: Orbit-basis multiplication satisfies unit law, commutativity, and associativity on a deterministic battery (and thus is eligible as a certified backend for later character/idempotent packets).

failure_taxonomy.trigger_condition: schema_id mismatch or missing required fields
A referenced cache file hash does not match the certificate
Engine source hash does not match the certificate
Recomputed conjugacy class partition or reps_hash differs from cached factor data
Factor structure constants fail integrality, unit law, or associativity battery
Orbit cache does not cover all product pairs exactly once or has fixed sign-orbits
Orbit representative in PSL2(Z/72Z) is not deterministically reproduced from factor reps via CRT+PSL normalization
Claimed unit element does not satisfy e*a=a or a*e=a on the deterministic battery
Associativity fails on the deterministic battery
Commutativity fails on the deterministic battery
Recomputed algebra fingerprint does not match the certificate

determinism_contract.nondeterminism_proof: All loops use deterministic ordering (sorted element tuples, deterministic conjugacy BFS on fixed generators S,T,T^{-1}, deterministic orbit canonicalization, deterministic battery generation from a fixed seed).
